Sāratthadīpanīṭīkā/Musāvādavagga/X/51.text: Anāpatti vuttā, yathā pavisituṁ asakkoṇeyya, tathā sambaddhabhittike (Ka)

Vinayapiṭaka/Rājavagga/X/508.text: Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 85; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 155; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 325; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 318 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.

Mahākhandhaka/X/X/1.text: Suttaputtasaññī(Syā), supūtaputtasaññī (Ka) mūlapaṇṇāsake sabbāsavasuttaṭīkāyaṁ pana passitabbaṁ.

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/10.text: Khu 11. 229 piṭṭhe milindapañhe cuṇṇiyavasena āgatā, Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 92; Jātaka-Ṭṭha 1. 66; Apadāna-Ṭṭha 1. 68 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.

Sāratthadīpanīṭīkā/X/X/11.text: Macchikā (Syā, Ka) ma-Ṭṭha 2. 94 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Vinayapiṭaka/X/Anattalakkhaṇasuttavaṇṇan.text: Purisapuggalo pare hanti, paresaṁ vā santakaṁ (Syā)

Vinayapiṭaka/X/Ādittapariyāyasuttavaṇṇan.text: Ma-Ṭṭha 1. 331; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 41; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 293; Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 380; Udāna-Ṭṭha 364; Buddhavaṁsa-Ṭṭha 61; Paṭisaṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 230; Cūḷaniddesa-Ṭṭha 49 piṭṭhesupi.
Āvibhāvatthena (Syā), avikappatthena (Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 17; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 241 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.

Sāratthadīpanīṭīkā/X/Ādittapariyāyasutta.text: Āvibhāvatthena (Syā), avikappatthena (Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 17; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 241 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.

Cammakkhandhaka/X/Ādittapariyāyasuttavaṇ.text: Samathe (Syā, Ka) Aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 124 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Vinayapiṭaka/X/Ādittapariyāyasuttavaṇṇan.text: Cātuddisikamahāmeghato (Ka), Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 15; Udāna-Ṭṭha 371 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.

Sāratthadīpanīṭīkā/X/Ādittapariyāyasutta.text: Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 244; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 290; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 65 piṭṭhādīsu taṭṭīkāsu ca passitabbaṁ.
Vivariyatūti (Syā, Ka) Aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 307 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Samathakkhandhaka/X/X/216.text: Gaṇhāti (Syā, Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 218 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Sāratthadīpanīṭīkā/X/X/222.text: Kusalanti, evaṁ sabbattha. Evaṁ abyākatanti vipākabhāvappattaṁ (Ka)

Senāsanakkhandhaka/X/X/294.text: Nadītumbantipi (Ka, Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 188; Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 119 piṭṭhesu ca) Saṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 51; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 223; Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 350 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.

Sāratthadīpanīṭīkā/X/X/310.text: Gantabbo paralokopi (Syā) Jātaka-Ṭṭha 1. 236 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Sāratthadīpanīṭīkā/X/X/333.text: Taṁ (Syā, Ka) aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 41 piṭṭhe vimativinodanīṭīkāyaṁ ca passitabbaṁ.

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/342.text: Taṁ (Syā, Ka) aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 41 piṭṭhe vimativinodanīṭīkāyaṁ ca passitabbaṁ.
